title: In Search of Excellence
author: Tom Peters, Robert H. Waterman
subline: Eight attributes of the world's best-run companies.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Eight hairline rings arranged in a search-grid, one is RED (the excellent company). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1050)" fill="none">
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5">
      <circle cx="-540" cy="-220" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="-220" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="-220" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="-220" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="-540" cy="40" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="40" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="40" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="-540" cy="300" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="300" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="300" r="80"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="300" r="80"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The one RED ring: the excellent company, marked -->
    <circle cx="20" cy="40" r="80" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="40" r="8" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Connecting dashed line from a corner ring to the red ring (the 'search' trail) -->
    <path d="M-540 -220 L-460 -180 L-380 -180 L-300 -140 L-220 -60 L-140 0 L-60 20 L20 40" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 6" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Label 'EXCELLENCE' tucked beneath the red ring -->
    <text x="20" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#fc1c46">EXCELLENCE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A search-grid of hairline rings; only one is red. A dashed trail leads from the corner of the grid to the red ring — the path the researchers took to find the excellent companies. 320px mixed-case title at the bottom. The single red is the 'found' company. The visual reads as the cover of the 1982 bestseller that started the management-canon genre.
